---
title: "MS R Script"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
editor: source
---

## Full R code {.unnumbered}

Here is presented the full R code used to produce the analyses of this manuscript.

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
#| purl: false
knitr::purl(input = "index.qmd", output = "script.txt", documentation = 0)
Script <- readLines("script.txt")
Script <- Script[Script != ""]
writeLines(Script, "script.txt")
cat(Script, sep = "\n")
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| code-fold: false
#| purl: false
#| echo: true
#| code-line-numbers: true

#MS TITLE - ORGANIZANDO DADOS----
#####....----

dev.off() #apaga os graficos, se houver algum
rm(list=ls(all=TRUE)) #limpa a memória
cat("\014") #limpa o console
#shell.exec(getwd())
getwd()
setwd("D:/Working/Directory")
library(openxlsx)

```
